name: agent-bridge
description: Persistent RPC bridge from Codex to OMP and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Use persistent OMP and OpenCode sessions from Codex
interface.longDescription: Agent Bridge gives Codex a persistent session bridge to local OMP and OpenCode agents. Codex opens a delegated-agent session, sends messages into it, polls status/result, can abort active turns, closes the session when finished, and can observe daemon sessions through a localhost-only UI monitor.
defaultPrompt: Open an OMP session and ask for a second pass
Use OpenCode to investigate this repository
Delegate a write-capable fix to OMP
